Hero.title: Where global travelers meet local businesses
Hero.subtitle: Leading platform that brings travel businesses and travelers together

Features.title: Unlock growth with Visit Vietnam
Features.subtitle: Leading digital travel platform: Smarter operations - Deeper insights - Revenue growth

0.title: Connect with global travelers
0.desc: Reach the right audience through high-quality, organic travel demand

1.title: Optimize Vietnam travel with data
1.desc: Understand customer behavior and make faster, data-driven decisions

2.title: A trusted Vietnam travel platform
2.desc: Strengthen your brand and boost conversion with trusted partners

3.title: Join the ecosystem
3.desc: Connect, collaborate, and unlock cross-selling opportunities

0.a: Visit Vietnam is a national digital travel platform that empowers Vietnam travel businesses to thrive in the digital era, connect directly with global travelers, and optimize operations through intelligent data.

1.a: Visit Vietnam operates on a performance-based model. Partners only pay service fees (commission) upon successful transactions.

2.q: How long does the approval process take?
2.a: The process typically takes 2–3 working days. Once all required information is submitted, the system will verify and activate your profile promptly.

3.q: What are the core benefits of becoming a partner?
3.a: Join the national ecosystem to elevate your Vietnam travel brand, access high-quality customers, and drive business growth through the platform.

4.q: How can my brand gain more visibility?
4.a: Partners can upgrade their tier to receive priority placement in premium positions and participate in large-scale national marketing campaigns.

5.q: How can I measure partnership performance?
5.a: Performance can be managed through an advanced dashboard, with periodic reports on reach, conversion rates, and detailed business performance by partnership tier.

Featured.desc: Prestigious travel magazine Condé Nast Traveler has just released its list of the world's most beautiful islands, with Phu Quoc earning a spot for its pristine natural beauty and world-class resort offerings.

0.title: Exploring the Seafood Paradise at Phu Quoc Night Market
0.excerpt: From herring salad to grilled sea urchin — join us as we highlight the must-try dishes when you visit Pearl Island.

1.title: The Perfect 4-Day, 3-Night Itinerary for First-Time Phu Quoc Visitors
1.excerpt: Detailed planning from transportation and accommodation to activities across both the north and south of the island.

2.title: The Summer's Biggest Beach Music Festival Is About to Land
2.excerpt: Thousands of travelers are expected to gather at Bai Truong for a thrilling series of music and water sports events.

3.title: The Mediterranean Spirit of Vietnam's "Sunset Town"
3.excerpt: Marvel at the vibrant colorful streets and the iconic Kiss Bridge — Vietnam's newest tourism landmark.

4.title: The "Green Pearl Island" Campaign: Protecting Coral Reefs Together
4.excerpt: A sustainability initiative to conserve Phu Quoc's marine biodiversity and raise community awareness.

5.title: Hon Thom Cable Car Sets New Visitor Record
5.excerpt: The world's longest sea-crossing cable car continues to cement its status as a must-try experience in Vietnam.

6.title: Hoi An Named a Top Cultural Destination in Asia
6.excerpt: The ancient town of Hoi An continues to be recognized for its unique blend of traditional architecture and modern living.

7.title: Da Lat's Wild Sunflower Season — A Golden Highland Paradise
7.excerpt: In November, the hillsides around Da Lat are blanketed in golden wild sunflowers — a bucket-list experience.

8.title: Hanoi Street Food Ranked Among the World's Top 10

9.title: Vietnam's First Personalized AI Travel App Launches

PainPoints.title: Why is planning a trip so stressful?
PainPoints.subtitle: Before you even arrive, you're already overwhelmed. Too many options, too little context, and no clear way to decide what's actually worth your time

items.title: Information overload
items.desc: Thousands of conflicting reviews take up your time and make it hard to know what to trust

items.title: Authenticity gaps
items.desc: The reality often falls short of the advertisements, and pricing across sources is not always transparent

items.title: Rigid itineraries
items.desc: Generic suggestions no longer inspire, yet you don't have the time to personally design a custom plan

items.title: Fragmented experience
items.desc: Each step - from planning to booking and payment - happens on a separate app, forcing you to switch back and forth

Testimonials.title: Real trip, real reviews
Testimonials.subtitle: See how travelers like you cut through the noise, made better decisions, and arrived in Vietnam knowing exactly what to expect

items.content: Way more convenient than expected. I just typed what I wanted and got a full plan in minutes.
items.name: Daniel Kim (South Korea)

items.content: Some suggestions felt really local, I probably wouldn't have found those places on my own. It didn't just show the usual tourist spots.
items.name: Emily Carter (United Kingdom)

items.content: It kind of feels like someone who knows Vietnam is helping you out. The suggestions were actually spot on for what I like.
items.name: Jason Lim (China)

items.content: I didn't have to switch between apps at all. That alone made things easier.
items.name: Michael Chen (Australia)

items.content: I wasn't even looking for deals, but still ended up saving quite a bit just by following the suggestions.
items.name: Anna Müller (Germany)

FAQ.title: Everything you need to know
FAQ.subtitle: Helpful information to guide you before starting your Vietnam journey

0.a: Visit Vietnam is the national travel app powered by AI to support your entire journey, from the initial planning stages to your on-ground experiences.

1.a: What makes us different is AI that actually gets your travel style, plus real local recommendations most apps miss

2.q: Are the offers on the app reliable?
2.a: Yes. Every deal and exclusive perk on Visit Vietnam comes from a network of verified, reputable partners with transparent and verifiable information.

3.q: Is the app free to use?
3.a: Absolutely. The app is completely free to download and use

4.q: Can I edit the AI-generated itinerary?
4.a: Yes. You have full flexibility to add, remove, or swap locations whenever you like to suit your preferences.

Experiences.title: Signature Experiences in Phu Quoc
Experiences.subtitle: The most loved activities and services among our travelers

0.title: VinWonders Phu Quoc + Cable Car Ticket
0.description: Experience Vietnam's largest theme park and the world's longest sea-crossing cable car.

1.title: South Island Coral Snorkeling Tour
1.description: Explore the wonders of the ocean with modern equipment and professional guides.

2.title: Night Squid Fishing + Seafood BBQ Tour
2.description: Experience squid fishing at sea after dark and enjoy the freshest seafood right on the spot.

3.title: 5-Star Meditation Spa Experience
3.description: Relax with a premium spa treatment combining natural essential oils and advanced massage techniques.

4.title: Hon Thom Cable Car + Water Park Tour
4.description: Take in panoramic views of Phu Quoc Island from the cable car, then splash around at the modern water park.

Meta.title: Ba Na Hills | Visit Vietnam
Meta.description: A heavenly escape featuring the legendary Golden Bridge, romantic French architecture, and four seasons in a single day.

Hero.subtitle: A heavenly escape featuring the legendary Golden Bridge, romantic French colonial architecture, and four distinct seasons all in one day.

Experiences.title: Signature Experiences at Ba Na Hills
Experiences.subtitle: The most loved activities and services among our travelers

0.title: Ba Na Hills Cable Car Ticket
0.description: Conquer the cable car system that holds 8 world records and gaze at the misty mountain peaks.

1.title: Fantasy Park + Amusement Zone
1.description: An indoor entertainment paradise with hundreds of games, 4D cinema, and roller coasters.

2.title: Golden Bridge + Flower Garden Tour
2.description: Stand on the bridge held aloft by giant stone hands — the most iconic photo spot in Southeast Asia.

3.title: Explore the French Village
3.description: Stroll through classic French colonial architecture recreating early 20th-century Europe amid the highland clouds.

4.title: Debay Wine Cellar
4.description: Savor premium wines aged in the most unique 100-year-old stone cellar in Southeast Asia.

5.title: Ba Na Carnival Festival
5.description: Immerse yourself in a vibrant street festival atmosphere with dance troupes, parades, and evening fireworks.

Meta.description: Real-time tourism intelligence platform for government bodies, provincial tourism offices, and official agencies across Vietnam.

Hero.title: Own the data, power Vietnam's tourism future
Hero.subtitle: Establishing a unified digital data ecosystem to support strategic decision-making at scale

PainPoints.title: Breaking the digital inertia in Vietnam travel
PainPoints.subtitle: Bottlenecks in connectivity, update frequency, and data reliability are hindering national-scale tourism governance

0.title: Data silos & systemic fragmentation
0.desc: Data is spread across multiple entities, lacking a cohesive system to bring everything together

1.title: The data-reality anachronism
1.desc: Traditional data aggregation creates significant time lags of 4 to 12 weeks, failing to reflect real-time Vietnam travel market dynamics

2.title: Absence of centralized trust architectures
2.desc: The lack of a unified national system for authenticating Vietnam travel businesses and services creates barriers to industry standardization

DashboardFeatures.title: Vietnam's integrated framework for tourism excellence
DashboardFeatures.subtitle: Gain a national overview, understand local insights, and standardize every sector with Visit Vietnam's dashboard

0.title: Market overview

1.title: Establish quality standards
1.desc: Ensuring verified identities and transparent data to support a trusted certification system

2.title: Forecasting & alerts
2.desc: Leveraging AI to analyze and forecast market demand, capacity, and fluctuations in the Vietnam travel market

ValueProps.title: Digitalizing excellence, redefining Vietnam travel
ValueProps.subtitle: Strengthen national tourism using reliable data and synchronized operations

0.title: Data-driven strategic agility
0.desc: Establishing a factual data foundation for policy-making, budget allocation, and tourism development planning

1.title: Strategic marketing calibration
1.desc: Identifying the right markets, destinations, and timing to focus efforts where they deliver the greatest impact

2.title: Frictionless data workflows
2.desc: Automating data aggregation and monitoring to reduce manual collection and significantly shorten reporting cycles

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Common questions from government and official agencies.

0.q: Who can access the government dashboard?
0.a: Access is available to verified government bodies, provincial tourism offices, and authorized research institutions. All applications are reviewed by our government relations team.

1.q: How is data privacy and sovereignty handled?
1.a: All data is stored within Vietnam under compliance with Decree 13/2023/ND-CP on personal data protection. Individual traveler data is aggregated and anonymized before any reporting.

2.a: Onboarding for government agencies typically takes 5–10 business days, including access provisioning, data scope agreement, and a guided orientation session.

3.q: Can the platform integrate with existing government systems?
3.a: Yes. We provide secure API endpoints compatible with common government data interchange standards. Custom integration scoping is available on request.

4.a: Government accounts receive a dedicated account manager, priority support SLA, and quarterly business reviews with our policy analytics team.
